caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, wearing headphones and a white shirt with a visible tattoo on his arm. He appears to be engaged in a podcast or radio show, as indicated by the professional audio equipment around him. The background consists of soundproofing panels, suggesting a studio setting. On the right side of the screen, there is an advertisement for "3D Thermo 3D Vacuum Insulation," which showcases a bottle and a cup designed to keep beverages at the perfect temperature. The ad also includes an image of a person outdoors holding a cup, emphasizing the product's practical use in various settings. The man seems to be listening intently, possibly reacting to something being said or played during the broadcast.
